config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society's interests matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights, because that can easily be used to justify abuse, censorship, or discrimination. In my view, a fair society protects people first and then asks individuals to contribute responsibly in return. From my perspective, the right balance is not "society over the individual," but mutual responsibility with clear limits on state power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, sejarah menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu memang tidak absolut dalam setiap situasi, tetapi justru hak-hak itulah yang menjadi batas agar mayoritas atau negara tidak semena-mena terhadap minoritas. Kepentingan sosial penting, namun harus dicapai melalui aturan yang adil dan pembatasan yang sangat jelas, bukan dengan mengorbankan kebebasan dasar orang. Kalau prioritasnya dibalik, saya khawatir hasilnya lebih sering menekan warga daripada benar-benar memperbaiki masyarakat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement because society’s interests should not automatically come before individual rights. In Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to "the public good" can be used to pressure minorities or excuse heavy-handed authority, so I am wary of giving society blanket priority. A healthy society is built by protecting basic rights first, then asking people to contribute through fair laws and civic duty. If individual rights are weakened too much, society does not become stronger; it becomes easier to control.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari pengalaman dan nilai politik di Amerika Serikat, “demi masyarakat” sering menjadi alasan yang licin untuk memperluas kekuasaan negara. Hak individu memang bisa dibatasi dalam keadaan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum yang mengalahkan kebebasan dasar. Poin tentang tanggung jawab sosial itu penting, tetapi tanggung jawab tidak sama dengan menyerahkan hak kepada mayoritas atau pemerintah. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru lahir ketika hak individu dilindungi kuat, lalu kepentingan bersama dibangun di atas perlindungan itu, bukan sebaliknya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should take priority over the individual as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I do value communal responsibility, but I have also seen how “for the public good” can become a convenient excuse for silencing minorities, weakening due process, or letting authorities overreach. Society is strongest when basic rights are protected first, because then people can contribute freely and without fear. If the collective is used to override individual rights too easily, it stops being solidarity and starts becoming control.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena menurut saya di Amerika Serikat alasan “demi kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan perluasan kekuasaan dan menekan kelompok minoritas. Hak individu memang tidak mutlak, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasannya harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan alasan untuk mengalahkan kebebasan dasar. Saya juga tidak setuju dengan gagasan bahwa kepentingan bersama otomatis lebih mulia; tanpa perlindungan hak, “kepentingan masyarakat” mudah berubah menjadi alat kontrol. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dari hak individu yang kuat, lalu tanggung jawab sosial dijalankan di atas fondasi itu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
